channel.title: Microsoft for Developers
channel.description: Get the latest information, insights, and news from Microsoft.

item.title: 【Visual Studio Code 1.115】Visual Studio 代码 1.115
item.description: 【Learn what's new in Visual Studio Code 1.115 (Insiders) Read the full article】了解 Visual Studio Code 1.115 中的新增功能（内部人士） 阅读全文

item.title: 【Microsoft Agent Framework Version 1.0】微软代理框架版本1.0
item.description: 【Today, we're thrilled to announce that Microsoft Agent Framework has reached version 1.0 for both .NET and Python. This is the production-ready release: stable APIs, and a commitment to long-term support. W】今天，我们很高兴地宣布 Microsoft Agent Framework 已达到适用于 .NET 和 Python 的 1.0 版。这是生产就绪版本：稳定的 API，以及对长期支持的承诺。瓦

item.title: 【How can I use Read­Directory­ChangesW to know when someone is copying a file out of the directory?】如何使用 ReadDirectoryChangesW 了解某人何时将文件复制出目录？
item.description: 【A customer was using Read­Directory­ChangesW in the hopes of receiving a notification when a file was copied. They found that when a file was copied, they received a FILE_NOTIFY_CHANGE_LAST_ACCESS, but】客户使用 ReadDirectoryChangesW 希望在复制文件时收到通知。他们发现，当复制文件时，他们收到了 FILE_NOTIFY_CHANGE_LAST_ACCESS，但是

item.title: 【🚀React Native Windows v0.82 is here!!】🚀React Native Windows v0.82 来了！！
item.description: 【React Native Windows v0.82 is here, marking a major milestone: the legacy Paper architecture has been fully removed. All applications now run exclusively on the New Architecture (Fabric), and this release also unlocks XAML controls for community modules — so Windows apps can seamlessly mix native XAML controls with React components. This】React Native Windows v0.82 现已发布，标志着一个重要的里程碑：遗留的 Paper 架构已被完全删除。现在，所有应用程序都专门在新架构 (Fabric) 上运行，并且此版本还解锁了社区模块的 XAML 控件，因此 Windows 应用程序可以将本机 XAML 控件与 React 组件无缝混合。这

item.title: 【Explore union types in C# 15】探索 C# 15 中的联合类型
item.description: 【Union types have been frequently requested for C#, and they're here. Starting with .NET 11 Preview 2, C# 15 introduces the union keyword. The union keyword declares that a value is exactly one of a fixed set of types with compiler-enforced exhaustive pattern matching. If you've used discriminated unions in F# or simil】C# 经常需要联合类型，它们就在这里。从 .NET 11 Preview 2 开始，C# 15 引入了 union 关键字。 union 关键字声明一个值恰好是具有编译器强制的详尽模式匹配的一组固定类型之一。如果您在 F# 或 simil 中使用过可区分联合

item.title: 【Aspire Docs in Your Terminal (and Your AI's Brain)】您的终端（和您的人工智能大脑）中的 Aspire 文档
item.description: 【You're three files deep in your Aspire AppHost, and you need to remember exactly which parameters the Redis integration expects. You could alt-tab to your browser, hunt through aspire.dev, squint at the API docs, then come back. Or you could just run a command. Or—better yet—let your AI agent look it up】您的 Aspire AppHost 中有三个文件，您需要准确记住 Redis 集成需要哪些参数。您可以按 alt-tab 键切换到浏览器，浏览 aspire.dev，查看 API 文档，然后返回。或者你可以只运行一个命令。或者——更好的是——让你的人工智能代理来查找它

item.title: 【Why doesn't the system let you declare your own messages to have the same semantics as WM_COPY­DATA?】为什么系统不允许您声明自己的消息具有与 WM_COPYDATA 相同的语义？
item.description: 【In a comment on my discussion on how to return results back from the WM_COPY­DATA message, Jan Ringoš observed that it felt wasteful th】在对我关于如何从 WM_COPYDATA 消息返回结果的讨论的评论中，Jan Ringoš 观察到这感觉很浪费

item.title: 【Python in Visual Studio Code - March 2026 Release】Visual Studio Code 中的 Python - 2026 年 3 月发布
item.description: 【We're excited to announce that the March 2026 release of the Python extension for Visual Studio Code are now available! This release includes the following announcements: Search Python Symbols in Installed Packages Experimental: Rust-】我们很高兴地宣布，2026 年 3 月发布的 Visual Studio Code Python 扩展现已推出！此版本包括以下公告：在已安装的包中搜索 Python 符号实验：Rust-
